IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THIS GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT BARS ANY ADDITIONAL CLAIMS FOR PARTIAL OR COMPARATIVE INDEMNITY BY ANY PRESENT OR FUTURE CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST SAM CHOW AND EMMA CHOW.
